headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' cdnjs.cloudflare.com cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; img-src * data: blob:; connect-src *.supabase.co *.supabase.in wss://*.supabase.co; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
